variables.notes: CR:nc|high. Used the explicit populated SG&A row. Added separate R&D expense as well because it is reported separately above operating profit and is not obviously embedded in 'Administration and sales expenses'; this allows PROF's (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD) treatment to exclude R&D.

candidates.why: Best available recurring finance-cost line; preferable as a single line when granular recurring interest components are not sufficiently available without double counting.
